hero.title: Our standard product catalogue
hero.subtitle: Our in-stock, quickly deliverable standard parts for three sectors. Please contact us for the detailed catalogue.

products.notice: Our full catalogue will be added as part of Plan 3 — we currently accept requests via the contact form.

hero.title: A global B2B engineering partner, from Bursa
hero.subtitle: If you want to design and have your own product manufactured — one team from brief to serial production.

steps.title: 1. Brief & NDA
steps.description: We listen to your requirements and sign an NDA if needed.

steps.title: 2. Feasibility
steps.description: Material selection, mould structure and cost projection — typically 5 business days.

steps.title: 3. Mould design
steps.description: 3D model, tolerance schematic and sample production.

steps.title: 4. Serial production
steps.description: Calibrated, repeatable production after sample approval.

items.label: Material
items.value: HDPE, LDPE, PP, POM, PA6, PBT, ABS

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality
confidentiality.body: Every project is run under an NDA; customer moulds and designs remain closed to third parties.

hero.title: Manufacturing in Bursa Organized Industrial Zone
hero.subtitle: 3,500 m² of indoor space, 14 injection moulding machines and a fully equipped quality laboratory.

hero.title: The same tolerance on every batch
hero.subtitle: Our quality management system, the certifications required for export, and our dimensional / visual inspection processes on every batch.

hero.title: From Bursa to the world since 1989
hero.subtitle: Kıta Plastik ve Tekstil has been in plastic injection moulding for 36 years, backed by three generations of engineering know-how.

story.title: Our story
story.body: We were founded in 1989 as a small workshop in Bursa. In our early years we produced machine parts for the textile sector. In the 2000s we expanded into the glass washing and packaging sectors. Today, with a team of 42, we deliver custom and standard solutions to domestic and export customers across three sectors.

items.title: Engineering discipline
items.description: Every project is delivered with measurable tolerances.

items.title: Long-term partnership
items.description: We've worked with most of our customers for 10+ years.

items.title: Transparent process
items.description: Clear communication at every stage, from feasibility to delivery.

hero.title: Let's talk about your project
hero.subtitle: Share your brief and we'll come back with a feasibility within 48 hours.

details.address: Bursa Organized Industrial Zone, Nilüfer / Bursa, Türkiye
